Imports

base_errors, oswrap, rx, helpers, colorstring, hlex_base, hparse_base

Types

JsonTokenKind = enum
  jtkLCurly, jtkRCurly, jtkString, jtkNumber, jtkColon, jtkComma, jtkKey,
  jtkLBrace, jtkRBrace, jtkFloat, jtkEof
JsonReader = object
  str: PosStr
  tok: JsonTok

JsonWriter = object
  stream: Stream
  indentBuf: string

Procs

proc close(w: var JsonWriter) {...}{.raises: [Exception, IOError, OSError],
                                tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc `=destroy`(w: var JsonWriter) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc newJsonWriter(stream: Stream): JsonWriter {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc newJsonWriter(file: AbsFile): JsonWriter {...}{.
    raises: [PathError, OSError, ValueError], tags: [ReadDirEffect].}
proc newJsonWriter(file: File): JsonWriter {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc write(w; str: string) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc space(w) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc line(w) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc indent(w) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc dedent(w) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc writeInd(w) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect].}
proc kind(r: JsonReader): JsonTokenKind {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc finished(r): bool {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [].}
proc next(r) {...}{.raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError, HLexerError],
               tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc newJsonReader(s: Stream): JsonReader {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError, HLexerError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc newJsonReader(s: string): JsonReader {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError, HLexerError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc jsonTokens(str: string): seq[JsonTok] {...}{.
    raises: [IOError, OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError, HLexerError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc writeJson(w; val: SomeInteger | string | SomeFloat | enum | bool)
proc loadJson(r; val: var SomeInteger)
proc loadJson(r; val: var string) {...}{.raises: [UnexpectedKindError, IOError,
    OSError, ArgumentError, ValueError, HLexerError], tags: [ReadIOEffect].}
proc loadJson[E: enum](r; val: var E)

Exports

setStr, finished, initParseResult, HsTokPredicate, ==, toHsParse, @, initParseResult, getPosition, initCharTok, [], $, newHTree, skip, parseDelimitedStar, [], newUnexpectedChar, strVal, initParseResult, skipTo, strVal, skip, splitKeyValue, wrap, ^*, treeRepr, [], isOk, HsTok, parseTokenKind, parseIdent, LexerIndentKind, parseToken, ==, add, newHTree, foldNested, initLexer, hasNxt, advance, len, add, parseFirstMatch, get, newHTree, newHTree, HsParseCallback, hasFlag, UnexpectedTokenError, parseLongestMatch, initTok, unexpectedTokenError, HsTokTree, topFlag, toColored, [], pairs, [], initTok, lift, splitSep, returnTo, HsLexCallback, lineCol, isFail, $, [], fillNext, drop, newHTree, nextToken, parsePlus, skip, HsLexer, initTok, toFlag, pop, ?, resetBuffer, pop, newLexerState, getAll, initLexer, HsLexerState, popRange, items, initLexer, expectKind, initParseResult, [], [], skipIndent, ParseError, initEof, insideBalanced, initTok, [], pushRange, [], lexAll, add, [], getInsideBalanced, [], raiseArgumentError, newArgumentError, raiseLogicError, canImport, InstantiationInfo, newImplementKindError, newImplementError, prepareMsg, kindToStr, raiseImplementKindError, newUnexpectedKindError, UnexpectedKindError, assertKind, LogicError, ParseError, raiseImplementError, ErrorAnnotation, GlobalSubstring, raiseUnexpectedKindError, ImplementError, ArgumentError, CodeError, ImplementKindError
